text:
Fixed! I've updated the error handling for both regular swaps and batch swaps to show user-friendly messages instead of raw JSON/code errors. The error messages now include:

- "Amount is too low. Please enter a larger amount." (for AMOUNT_TOO_LOW errors)
- "Insufficient balance for this swap."
- "Slippage tolerance too low. Try increasing it."
- "Not enough liquidity for this swap."
- "Network error. Please try again."
- "Unable to get quote. Please try a different amount or token." (generic fallback)

The raw error details are still logged to the console for debugging, but users will see clean, simple sentences.
